items.title: Stockholm-based AI coding startup Lovable reaches $400M in ARR, up from $300M in January; rival Cursor hit $2B in annualized revenue in February, per a source (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Stockholm-based AI coding startup Lovable reaches $400M in ARR, up from $300M in January; rival Cursor hit $2B in annualized revenue in February, per a source (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 总部位于斯德哥尔摩的人工智能编码初创公司 Lovable 的 ARR 达到 4 亿美元，高于 1 月份的 3 亿美元；据消息人士透露，竞争对手 Cursor 2 月份年化收入达到 20 亿美元（彭博社）
